# {{PROJECT}} System Specification

The authoritative description of what this system does, for whom, and how.
Code is checked against this spec. If implementation diverges from SPEC.md,
either the code or the spec must be updated — drift is a Principle 2 violation.

**FGT enforcement:** The Stop hook warns when src/ files change without
SPEC.md being updated. See REVIEWS_{{DOMAIN}}.md § Scope Alignment.
